name: Navy Federal Credit Union Personal Loans
description: Navy Federal Credit Union offers Personal Loans with funding up to $50,000, minimum credit score of 580, and 2-4 days approval time. Features include: Military-Friendly, Personal Loans, Auto Loans.

review.reviewBody: Navy Federal Credit Union is a top-rated provider of Personal Loans with a BCS rating of 4.6/5 based on 1800 customer reviews. Their military-focused approach and flexible loan terms make them an excellent choice for service members and their families.
